blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 103 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
